title: Hegseth Says U.S. Strike Killed an Iranian Who Plotted to Assassinate Trump
summary_full: The Pentagon provided few details, but the Trump administration has said that Iran’s efforts to kill U.S. officials is one reason the United States launched its bombing campaign.
summary_public: The Pentagon provided few details, but the Trump administration has said that Iran’s efforts to kill U.S. officials is one reason the United States launched its bombing campaign.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Strike Killed an Iranian Who Plotted to Assassinate Trump
